name: design-review-mini
description: Testing plugin for concise UX critique and visual polish recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Give fast UI critique with focused next-step suggestions
interface.longDescription: Use Design Review Mini to assess clarity, hierarchy, and friction in a small product surface, then return a short list of prioritized changes.
defaultPrompt: Review this screen and point out the biggest UX issues.
Give me three high-impact design changes for this flow.
Critique this interface for clarity and visual hierarchy.
